title: Better Tricky Trials MOD
description: A mod that is used as a library for Better Tricky Trials DP
body:
# Better Tricky Trials MOD

Free and open-source mods for Minecraft 1.21 and higher that adds custom effects for the proper functioning of the [Better Tricky Trials DP](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-tricky-trials-dp) datapack.

## Features

This mods adds from one to three custom effects depending on the game version:

in all versions you will have the dreaming effect which prevents phantom spawning for its owner even if they have not slept for 3 in-game days

For versions lower than 24w35a, you will have the bastion_omen and city_omen effects which will enable you to retrieve all the new key variants in the [Better Tricky Trials DP](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-tricky-trials-dp) datapack.
